items.configValue: {"$schema":"http://json-schema.org/draft-07/schema#","description":"A list of commerce orders generated by AI.","properties":{"orders":{"description":"An array of generated order objects.","items":{"properties":{"accountId":{"description":"The ID of the account that placed the order.","type":"string"},"externalReferenceCode":{"description":"A unique identifier for the order.","type":"string"},"items":{"description":"The items included in the order.","items":{"properties":{"quantity":{"description":"The quantity of the product.","minimum":1,"type":"integer"},"sku":{"description":"The SKU of the product.","type":"string"}},"required":["sku","quantity"],"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"orderStatus":{"description":"The numeric status of the order (e.g., 0 for pending, 1 for processing).","type":"number"}},"required":["accountId","items","externalReferenceCode"],"title":"Order","type":"object"},"type":"array"}},"required":["orders"],"title":"OrderList","type":"object"}
